problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix may resolve What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
